title: HT Master Data
description: Manage HT units, condition, borrowing status, and inventory barcodes.

field.barcodePlaceholder: Leave empty to use the HT code

create.title: Add HT Data
create.description: Enter the new HT unit details.

edit.title: Edit HT Data
edit.description: Update the selected HT unit details.

delete.title: Delete HT Data
delete.description: HT data {code} will be removed from master data.

validation.htCodeMax: HT code must be 32 characters or less.
validation.barcodeMax: Barcode must be 64 characters or less.
validation.barcodeInvalid: Barcode can only contain letters, numbers, hyphens, and underscores.
validation.brandTypeMax: Brand or type must be 100 characters or less.
